hero_description: Welcome to my professional space. Here you'll find my career path, technical skills and the projects I've worked on. I invite you to learn more about my profile and explore how I can contribute to your team or project.
about_description: I'm a web developer with experience in creating modern, responsive web applications. I specialize in JavaScript and its frameworks like React, along with HTML and CSS to create exceptional user experiences.
about_description2: I enjoy solving complex problems and turning ideas into functional digital products. I'm constantly learning new technologies to stay updated with industry trends.
about_communication_desc: Ability to convey technical ideas clearly and accessibly to different audiences.
about_team_desc: Experience coordinating technical teams and fostering a collaborative environment.
about_problem_desc: Analytical approach to identify efficient solutions to complex challenges.
about_math_desc: Application of mathematical concepts to model and solve programming problems.
about_english_desc: Ability to communicate in English in technical and professional contexts.
project1_desc: Educational platform for selling online courses. Includes content management system, video playback and payment processing. Developed in collaboration to offer accessible, quality education.
project2_desc: Wordle-style game where users must find hidden words. Developed with vanilla JavaScript, HTML5 and CSS3, implementing complex game logic and interactive animations.
project3_desc: An interactive platform designed to make learning English more enjoyable and effective. This platform is mobile-friendly.
project4_desc: It's your space to organize your daily tasks in an easy and entertaining way. With our manager, you can add, complete, edit and delete tasks. Start organizing your day with a smile!
project5_desc: Mobile application that creates secure communities through private groups. I developed the complete backend, including notification system and database management. The app allows sharing locations, sending real-time alerts and assisting people with disabilities.
project6_desc: An advanced tool designed to facilitate complex mathematical calculations with an adaptable and multilingual interface. This page is mobile-friendly.
project7_desc: A space where you can publish and download books for free. Explore a wide variety of ebooks in multiple categories and contribute by sharing your own writings with the community.

education_holberton_desc: Intensive training in software development with specialization in:
education_ipa_desc: Training in pedagogy and didactics of mathematics:
contact_description: I'm available for freelance projects, job opportunities, or just to chat about technology.
